scenes.text:
Night found them in the Lonely Mountain. the Desolation provided some shelter.

The company was tending to their gear and provisions.

Bilbo sharpened a blade.

It was tedious work, but it passed the time. When all was ready, they prepared for what might come.

Morning found them in Wilderland. wandering streams were visible nearby.

The company was occupied with various tasks.

Ori and Thorin argued quietly about the route.

It was tedious work, but it passed the time. When all was ready, they prepared for what might come.

It was midday in Wilderland. open sky marked their surroundings.

The company was tending to their gear and provisions.

Bilbo mended a torn cloak.

It was necessary work, but it passed the time. When all was ready, they moved on.

Midday light spread across the Lonely Mountain. Ruins of Dale stood silent.

Thorin paused, sitting apart from the others. The the Lonely Mountain stretched out in all directions, the Front Gate marking the landscape.

How far they had come, and how far yet to go.

After a time, Thorin rejoined the company, saying nothing of what had passed through their mind.

Evening light spread across Wilderland. Open sky stood silent.

Bilbo paused, turning slowly in place. The Wilderland stretched out in all directions, open sky marking the landscape.

How far they had come, and how far yet to go.

After a time, Bilbo rejoined the company, saying nothing of what had passed through their mind.
